texto: I am a legal immigrant whose parents went from Russia to China to Chile to finally reach the United States and thereby give me a chance to have a better life. I served six years in the U.S. Army Reserve, went to college, have a successful career and have dedicated my life to being a good citizen.
explicacao: Citação de Mike Medavoy sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “I am a legal immigrant whose parents went from Russia to China to Chile to finally reach the Unit…” articula trabalho, vida, good em registro de trabalho, com relevância para contextos como good e parents.

frase_original: I am a legal immigrant whose parents went from Russia to China to Chile to finally reach the United States and thereby give me a chance to have a better life. I served six years in the U.S. Army Reserve, went to college, have a successful career and have dedicated my life to being a good citizen.
